rows.notes: P77 starts only after the landed P76 sidecar.
The keep-set normalization sidecar should run on the live p75 branch.
README and STATUS should expose the convergence sidecar stack on top of the p75 route.
Current-stage driver should keep p74 as current review and p64 as preserved deeper review lineage.
The registry should expose the balanced active keep set and preserved lineage explicitly.
The active keep branches should now have explicit upstream provenance before any convergence work.
Plans router should expose the new convergence design and post-P80 handoff prompts.
